title: Apidog Project
description: Represents an Apidog project, the top-level container for endpoints, schemas, and environments managed through the Apidog API.

projectId.description: The unique identifier of the Apidog project.

name.description: The human-readable name of the project.

description.description: A brief description of what this project contains.

endpointCount.description: Total number of API endpoints in the project.

schemaCount.description: Total number of data schemas in the project.

environmentCount.description: Total number of environments configured in the project.

apiVersion.description: The Apidog API version used when interacting with this project.
